support.summary: No CEO action required; deal at 10% confidence, qualify-out likely
support.detail: Riyadh Cables ($200k, Formal Evaluation) failed its 4 Jun demo on a hard zero-touch PO / materials-management requirement Zycus cannot meet, and the rep set confidence to 10% with qualify-out likely. No pricing block, roadmap commitment, presales guarantee, or CEO-to-CEO peer connect has been requested or mapped, and the economic buyer is still unidentified. Nothing here is CEO-irreplaceable; VP/RSD re-engagement or a product-gap reframe is the appropriate next step.
support.why_not_vp: The only viable moves (assess roadmap feasibility, reframe the two-click process, multi-thread to VP Supply Chain/CFO) are standard RSD/VP work on a non-forecasted, sub-250k, 10%-confidence deal; no CEO-exclusive lever is in play.

monitor.reason: No monitor trigger has a qualifying signal inside the last 14 days; the demo failure and silence began 4 Jun (>14 days ago) and all in-window movement is CRM housekeeping.
